data.title: Insurance Stocks Rebound As Investors Assess Hurricane Milton's Aftermath: 3 Stocks To Watch
data.description: Hurricane Milton hits Florida, leaving millions without power. Insurance stocks rebound while chemical and generator companies see mixed trading.
